issues_fixed: Added vanilla Quran audio sync module with data-start/data-end mapping, data-duration fallback, smooth scrolling, active ayah highlighting, seek/buffering handlers, and per reciter+sura resume storage.
Added Media Session metadata, play/pause/seek action handlers, and positionState updates.
Integrated Quran sync on the Quran detail page and exposed window.quranSyncInstance for lifecycle saves.
Added Capacitor/Android background-audio manifest permissions plus app pause lifecycle persistence hooks and documentation for plugin/native service integration.

Updated service worker strategies: cache-first for hashed static assets, network-first for API, stale-while-revalidate for fonts/audio manifests, and no Cache Storage persistence for large streamed audio files.
Kept Firebase/ad/analytics values as environment placeholders, added Quran sync env placeholders, and ensured build placeholder injection includes the new keys.
Added Node/Jest-style quran sync test coverage and CI placeholder workflow to run npm ci, npm test, and npm run build:web.
Documented audio timestamp generation, env vars, Android background playback testing, and license/caching notes.
No git history rewrite was performed for previously committed secrets; rotate credentials and coordinate BFG/git-filter-repo cleanup separately if needed.
testing_steps_for_pr: npm run dev or python3 -m http.server 5173
Open quran page, play audio, verify highlight follows ayah
Pause mid-ayah, close tab, reopen, press play -> resumes from saved time
On Android build, test background playback and resume after app pause
